rag_rules: When fixing type mismatches in AGREE contracts, ensure left and right sides of binary expressions have matching types.
Only use assign statements for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Validate that all identifiers in AGREE contracts are visible in the current scope and properly typed.
Ensure AGREE scalar type declarations use int, real, or bool; avoid package-qualified or invalid type names.
For guarantee expressions, relate visible outputs to visible inputs without relying on implementation-only paths.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers in generated AGREE code.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope; use component type annexes for such contracts.
Do not attempt to resolve type errors by adding new architecture elements; instead, correct or remove invalid clauses.
